name: Bacony Creamed Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach by boiling or in microwave until heated through. Drain well and squeeze out as much moisture as possible. Chop fine using a food processor or food grinder.
2. Cook bacon in a skillet until crisp. Remove and drain. Crumble and reserve the bacon. In about 2 tablespoons of the bacon fat, sauté garlic and onion over medium heat. When onions are limp, add spinach. Lower heat. Season with salt and pepper; stir well as moisture evaporates from spinach, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.
3. In a separate large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Sprinkle flour in, stirring constantly until smooth. Gradually stir in half-and-half or milk, cooking until smooth and bubbly. Stir in the spinach mixture and heat through. Remove from heat, stir in reserved bits of bacon, and serve.
